creative_brief: Close-up of Rachel Ward looking thoughtfully at cattle grazing in open pasture, authentic farming setting.
primary_text:
I've been farming cattle in Kempsey for years. When I see beef in supermarkets, I wonder: which farm? What feed? How many trucks did it pass through?

That's why I partnered with FarmThru. Every piece of beef comes direct from named farms. You'll know exactly where it came from.

No commitment. Collect from Brookvale, Mon to Fri.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: I wonder about supermarket beef
description: Rachel Ward, Kempsey farmer, on partnering with FarmThru for transparent farm-direct food.
